citations.claim: Darkbloom is a provider agent for Apple Silicon Macs that manages local inference requests and handles attestation using Apple Secure Enclave
The component is named 'darkbloom' and is described as an 'EigenInference provider agent for Apple Silicon Macs'
The CLI provides 15+ subcommands including init, serve, install, enroll, models, earnings, doctor, start, stop, logs, update, login, logout, autoupdate, and hash-runtime
WebSocket client manages connection to coordinator with automatic reconnection, registration, heartbeats, and attestation challenges
Backend manager wraps vllm-mlx with health monitoring and automatic restart using exponential backoff
Legacy local-only HTTP server exists as debug escape hatch with OpenAI-compatible endpoints, quarantined behind environment variables
Ephemeral X25519 key pairs generated fresh on each launch for E2E encryption using NaCl Box
launchd user agent management allows controlled start/stop without auto-restart functionality
Configuration system uses TOML format with hardware-adaptive defaults and CLI override capabilities
Telemetry subsystem uses async batching with HTTPS POST to coordinator and disk overflow protection
Uses tokio async runtime with full features for WebSocket handling and concurrent operations
Uses reqwest HTTP client with JSON and streaming support for backend communication and coordinator API calls
Uses crypto_box for NaCl-compatible X25519 + XSalsa20-Poly1305 encryption and base64/sha2 for cryptographic operations
macOS-specific dependencies include security-framework for Secure Enclave operations and core-foundation for system integration
Local HTTP API provides OpenAI-compatible endpoints for health, models, and chat completions
Integrates with multiple external systems including coordinator URLs, R2 CDN, and enrollment profiles
Request proxy handles inference forwarding between coordinator and backend with secure memory wiping
WebSocket protocol includes registration, heartbeats, inference requests/responses, and attestation challenges
Runtime verification system ensures Python binary and package integrity through hash verification
Exponential backoff recovery system with 1s to 5s maximum delay for backend restart reliability
